name: tech.ocula.shopping.descriptors
title: Shopping Descriptors
description: Adds structured descriptor data (highlights, Q&A, use cases, intent tags, differentiators) to products returned by catalog responses, so AI agents can assess contextual fit. Descriptors attach at the product level only in v0.1; variant-level descriptors are out of scope.

product_with_descriptors.title: Product with Descriptors
product_with_descriptors.description: A UCP product decorated with a `descriptors` object.

augmented_search_response.title: Augmented Catalog Search Response
augmented_search_response.description: A `dev.ucp.shopping.catalog.search` response in which each product carries a `descriptors` object.

augmented_lookup_response.title: Augmented Catalog Lookup Response
augmented_lookup_response.description: A `dev.ucp.shopping.catalog.lookup` response in which each product carries a `descriptors` object.
